name: shipyard
description: Local development dashboard for managing projects, tasks, git, and terminals

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "pnpm --filter shipyard-server dev" "pnpm --filter shipyard-client dev"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -n electron,client -c cyan,green "pnpm electron:dev" "pnpm --filter shipyard-client dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter shipyard-client build && pnpm --filter shipyard-server build && pnpm electron:build
scripts.electron:dev: cd electron && npx tsc && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER=http://localhost:5421 electron ../electron/dist/main.js
